---
title: "COVID-19"
format: dashboard
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

source("R/setup.R")
source("R/masterfunction.R")

covid_report <- build_disease_report(
  data = fake_cases_clean,
  disease_name = "COVID-19"
)
```

# Summary

# Geographic Distribution

## Row

### COVID-19 Cases by Census Tract

```{r}
#| title: "COVID-19 Cases by Census Tract"

leaflet(covid_map) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal(cases),
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    color = "white",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "Tract: ", GEOID,
      "<br>Cases: ", cases
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    pal = pal,
    values = ~cases,
    title = "COVID Cases"
  )
```

### Column

#### Total COVID Cases

```{r}
#| label: total COVID case count
#| echo: false
#| content: valuebox

value_box(
  value = total_covid_cases,
  title = "Total COVID Cases"
)
```

#### COVID Cases by Census Tract

```{r}
#| label: COVID case count by tract
#| echo: false

covid_table_display <- DT::datatable(
  covid_table,
  options = list(
    scrollY = "400px",
    scrollCollapse = TRUE,
    paging = FALSE
  )
)

covid_table_display
```

# Time-Trends

```{r}
covid_report$weekly_plot
```

# Demographics

## Column

### Age

```{r}
covid_report$age_plot
```

### Sex

```{r}
covid_report$sex_plot
```
